topic: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am going to school. He came from Delhi. The cat went into the room. He climbed onto the table. We passed through the forest.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He went across the road. We walked along the river. I am going home from the office. He jumped into the water. The children climbed onto the bus.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "हम टनल से निकले।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He climbed onto the table yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We walked along the beach. I am going from Mumbai to Delhi. The water was poured into the bottle. He climbed onto the roof.
